included: Fresh pytest temporary roots passed to secure_extract_archive
Delta-created workspace directories beneath those roots
Delta error string, repr, and traceback surfaces
Rendered Streamlit widget and session state after the rejected-upload rerun
excluded: Swap, crash, reboot, backup, and infrastructure logs

verified_conditions: Archive rejection occurs before an extraction workspace is created.
Injected materialization and integrity failures remove Delta workspaces.
Cleanup failure is surfaced as a stable content-free error code.
Public rejection objects detach Python cause and context references; formatted tracebacks exclude injected payload, archive, and system-path canaries.
Zip-slip fixtures do not modify the outside disk canary.
Application outcome and receipt objects retain no payload bytes.
Rejected uploader keys rotate; the new widgets contain zero files and the old filename and payload canary are absent from visible and filtered session state.
